allow: PowerShell(cd e:\\Repos\\monitoring_diagram_prototype; git ls-files | Where-Object { $_ -match 'node_modules/@\(esbuild|rollup\)/' } | ForEach-Object { \($_ -split '/'\)[1,2] -join '/' } | Sort-Object -Unique)

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/ehab3dhassan-prog/monitoring_diagram_prototype" -UseBasicParsing -Headers @{ "User-Agent"="check" }; $j = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; "VISIBILITY: $\($j.visibility\)"; "DEFAULT BRANCH: $\($j.default_branch\)"; "OWNER TYPE: $\($j.owner.type\)" } catch { "HTTP: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\) - repo is private or missing" })
